message.content:
@startuml
title US004 - As Administrator, I want to search for users

actor Administrator
participant ": SearchUsersByParamsRoute" as Route
participant "inDto : SearchUserDto" as InDto
participant ": UsersController" as Controller
participant ": SearchUsersByParamsService" as Service
participant ": ISystemUserRepo" as Repo
participant ": IUserProfileRepo" as ProfileRepo
participant "usersFound : List<SystemUser>" as UsersFound
participant "usersFoundDto : List<UserDto>" as UsersFoundDto
participant "user : SystemUser" as User
participant ": SystemUserMapper" as Mapper
participant "userDto : OutputUserDto" as UserDto
participant "usersJson : ResponseEntity" as UsersJson

Administrator -> Route: 1 GET /users?name={name}&email={email}&profile={profile}&func={func}
note right of Administrator: The parameters (name, email, profile and function) will be in the query of the request. At least, one of than must be typed or chosen.
Route -> Controller: 2 searchUsersByTypedParams(inDto)
Controller -> Service: 3 searchUsersByTypedParams(inDto)

opt if the request has a profile
    Service -> ProfileRepo: 4 result : existsByUserProfileId(profile)
end

alt depending on which params came from inputDto, the service class will invoke the respective method
    Service -> Repo: 5 findAllBy...()
    Repo -> UsersFound: 6 create()
    Service -> Service: 7 usersFound
end

Service -> UsersFoundDto: 8 create()

loop for which user found at the list
    Service -> Mapper: 9 model2Dto(user)
    Mapper -> UserDto: 10 create()
    Service -> Service: 11 userDto
    Service -> Service: 12 addUserDto
end

Service -> Controller: 13 usersFoundDto
Controller -> Controller: 14 createUsersFoundDto
Controller -> UsersJson: 15 usersJson
UsersJson -> Administrator: 16 Show the list of user found by typed/chosen parameters

@enduml
